name: Zowie AI Customer Service Automation API
what_it_does: AI-powered customer service automation platform with API — automatically resolving repetitive customer inquiries for e-commerce and retail businesses, integrating with existing helpdesks (Zendesk, Freshdesk, Gorgias), learning from historical tickets, and escalating complex issues to human agents.
use_cases: Integrating Zowie AI into existing helpdesk (Zendesk/Gorgias) to automate repetitive tickets
Querying Zowie automation metrics (deflection rate, resolved tickets) for support reporting
Configuring Zowie intents and responses via API for custom support automation
Routing unresolved AI conversations to human agents via helpdesk integration
Pulling e-commerce order data into Zowie for automated order status responses
not_for: B2B enterprise support (Zowie focuses on e-commerce/retail consumer support)
Complex technical support requiring knowledge base depth (use Intercom or Zendesk AI)
Voice-based customer service (Zowie is chat/messaging focused)
best_when: An e-commerce or retail brand handles high volumes of repetitive support tickets (WISMO, returns, refunds) and wants to automate 40-70% of tickets while keeping existing Zendesk, Gorgias, or Freshdesk helpdesk.
avoid_when: You have complex, unique support inquiries, B2B technical support needs, or already have low ticket volumes that don't justify AI automation investment.

auth.notes: API key from Zowie dashboard. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for conversation events and escalations. Helpdesk OAuth (Zendesk, Freshdesk, Gorgias) for native integration. E-commerce OAuth (Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento) for order data. No fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: Polish company (Warsaw). Founded 2020. Raised $26M Series A (2022). Backed by Tiger Global, Gradient Ventures (Google). E-commerce customer service automation niche — strongest for high-volume consumer brands. Zowie X1 AI engine trained on e-commerce support patterns. Deflection rate metric (% of tickets auto-resolved) is primary KPI. 1,000+ e-commerce brands including Decathlon, Avon.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for conversations, intents, analytics, and configuration. API key bearer auth. Limited public API documentation. Configuration primarily via Zowie dashboard. Helpdesk and e-commerce OAuth integrations handle most data flow. Webhook for escalation events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Analytics reads idempotent. Conversation reads idempotent. Intent configuration operations may not be idempotent — use intent ID for updates.
known_agent_gotchas: E-commerce focus — limited for B2B or technical support use cases
Helpdesk integration (Zendesk/Gorgias) is primary setup — not standalone chat widget
Training period required — Zowie learns from historical tickets (6+ months data ideal)
Annual contract — validate deflection rate ROI potential before committing
Per-resolution pricing model — costs scale with successful automation volume

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and SOC2 compliant. EU and US data residency. API key auth. Customer conversation data is PII — GDPR data processing agreement required. Polish company with EU-first GDPR design. E-commerce order data (names, addresses, order history) requires careful data handling in integrations.
